_description: Signed transaction fixture — the witness layout the Necklace TS signer must produce for a Taproot key-path (Schnorr) spend, which is the ONLY signing path in the MVP. Byte values are ILLUSTRATIVE; the witness STRUCTURE is exact, from Pearl source.
_source: wallet/wallet/txauthor/author.go (spendTaprootKey: txIn.Witness = {sig}), wallet/wallet/signer.go (ComputeInputScript -> RawTxInTaprootSignature), node/wire/msgtx.go (witness serialization), wallet/wallet/xmss_test.go (key-path still works on commitment addresses)
signingScheme: BIP-340 Schnorr over secp256k1 (Taproot key-path), SigHashDefault. NO cgo, NO XMSS.

keyPath: <64-byte Schnorr signature (or 65 bytes if a non-default sighash is appended)>
witnessLayout._keyPathNote: Single stack item. With SigHashDefault the signature is 64 bytes and no sighash byte is appended.
witnessLayout._scriptPathNote: Documented for completeness only. XMSS script-path is DEFERRED (stateful OTS index, cgo-bound signer). The MVP never emits this.

signedTx.label: ILLUSTRATIVE
signedTx._rawTxNote: Standard btcd SegWit serialization: version(4 LE) | 0x00 marker | 0x01 flag | varint nIn | inputs(outpoint 36 + scriptlen + sequence 4) | varint nOut | outputs(value 8 LE + scriptlen + pkScript) | witness(per input: varint nItems + items) | locktime(4 LE).

broadcast._constraint: Necklace signs locally; only this rawTxHex is POSTed to the Railway broadcast API. No private key or password ever leaves the extension.
broadcast.method: sendrawtransaction-equivalent on the Railway pearld + API
